## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] `xcodebuild test` passes
- [ ] Release build and static analyzer pass
- [ ] Manual macOS behavior checked when applicable

## Risk and compatibility

- [ ] Persisted Codable fields, preset IDs, enum raw values, and `ColorFlow.expression` remain compatible, or a migration is included
- [ ] No credentials, device identifiers, IP addresses, exported preferences, or unsanitized diagnostics are included
- [ ] Privacy, sandbox entitlements, local-network trust, and menu-bar lifecycle behavior remain correct

## Screenshots

Include before/after images for user-interface changes when useful.
